title: psorospermum brachypodum
intro: Psorospermum brachypodum, also known as the Ceylon oak tree or the Ceylon oak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Guttiferae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as treating digestive issues and skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Psorospermum brachypodum include extracts and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, ointments, and other remedies.
